name: prospect-identification
description: Given a company name and description, identify their ideal customer business types and decision maker titles

biz_type_accuracy.description: Does the output correctly identify the company's CUSTOMERS (not the company's own industry)?

dm_accuracy.description: Are the decision maker titles correct for the identified business type?

label_norm.description: Are labels crisp, lowercase, using common abbreviations?

format_comp.description: Format compliance: word counts, plural, 'and' separator, lowercase
